articles.description: Iran and US mark their high-stakes talks in Pakistan's Islamabad. Asim Munir who received delegates from both nations had a change of attire. Check it out.

articles.title: Video: ‘Crucial talks’ says Al Jazeera reporter at US-Iran meeting venue
articles.description: Talks involving officials from Iran and Pakistani mediators have begun in Islamabad.

articles.title: Rediscovering Vaanam: How a contemporary festival in Tamil Nadu celebrates Dalit History Month
articles.description: Four editions in, Neelam’s annual Dalit History Month celebration Vaanam, gets a new lease of life, with a competition category in their film festival, some dramatics, a literary festival, and an art exhibit

articles.title: 15-year-old missing girl from Kerala found dead near Chikkamagaluru waterfall
articles.description: The body was about 500 mtrs below the place from where the tourists view the waterfalls

articles.title: China's expanding surveillance state and crackdowns draw global scrutiny
articles.description: Concerns grow over China's global surveillance technology and repression of Uyghurs. The World Uyghur Congress highlighted these issues. Activists marked 36 years since the Baren Uprising, a key moment of Uyghur resistance. Demonstrations called for justice. China's new economic security framework also raises global unease.

articles.title: Caught on camera: Mirzapur advocate shot dead in broad daylight; assailants run away on bike after killing him
articles.description: Rajeev Singh, a 50-year-old advocate, was shot dead in Mirzapur during his morning walk, allegedly due to an ongoing dispute. Police are investigating and have formed five teams to apprehend the suspects, who are residents of Singh's village.

articles.title: In Chettinad, the holiday comes with homework
articles.description: At the Kalai festival of Art and Architecture, curated by The Lotus Palace, historic mansions are turning into spaces for learning, drawing travellers seeking a deeper engagement with heritage, design and culture

topStories.title: US-Iran war: Why is Tehran unable to open Strait of Hormuz to more shipping traffic? American officials reveal
topStories.description: US officials said that Iran struggles to reopen the Strait of Hormuz due to uncertainty over naval mine locations and its inability to clear them. A two-week cease-fire would depend on the ‘complete, immediate, and safe opening’ of the Strait of Hormuz, Trump said on Tuesday.

topStories.title: US, Iran To Hold Key Peace Meet Shortly. What's On The Agenda?
topStories.description: While Iran has a 10-point proposal, which Donald Trump had said would be "workable", the US had its own 15-point framework.

topStories.title: Supreme Court says voting, contesting polls not fundamental rights: ‘It’s well settled'
topStories.description: A bench of Justices BV Nagarathna and R Mahadevan said that these rights exist only to the extent provided by law.

topStories.title: On Camera, Youth Congress Leader Killed 2 Weeks Before Wedding In Karnataka
topStories.description: Fairoz Pathan's body was found on the bedroom floor. He appears to have suffered a head injury, as he lay in a pool of blood.

topStories.title: Iran Brings Minab 168 Child Victims Images To Islamabad Ceasefire Talks
topStories.description: Iran arrived in Islamabad for US ceasefire talks carrying images of Minab 168 child victims, turning the negotiations into a demand for accountability.

topStories.title: IAF chief A P Singh discusses defence ties with his US counterpart
topStories.description: IAF chief Air Chief Marshal A P Singh also travelled to Nellis Air Force Base in Nevada, where the visit included briefings at the US Air Force Warfare Centre and a familiarisation flight in an F-15EX Eagle II.

dailyNews.description: U.S. intelligence reports suggest China is set to deliver new air defense systems to Iran, potentially using third countries to obscure their origin.

dailyNews.description: The Iranian delegation, led by Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, is named ‘Minab 168,’ after the school children killed in US-Israel strikes on the first day of the war.

dailyNews.description: Maine Gov. Janet Mills' Senate platform includes filibuster reform that mirrors President Donald Trump and conservatives' own push for a talking filibuster in the Republican-led Senate.

dailyNews.title: Missing American’s husband had 'spotty' cell service during 8-hour trek to report disappearance: telecom boss
dailyNews.description: Brian Hooker spent 8 hours paddling a dinghy across a Bahamas channel after his wife Lynette reportedly fell overboard before he notified authorities.

dailyNews.description: California Republicans vote this Sunday to endorse a candidate for governor after Trump backed Steve Hilton over rival Sheriff Chad Bianco last week.

dailyNews.description: Election integrity group RITE and Rep. Claudia Tenney threatened federal court action over alleged New York voter registration violations.

dailyNews.description: JD Vance, Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner lead a senior U.S. delegation in Pakistan for critical ceasefire negotiations with Iranian officials.

dailyNews.description: The building sits across a driveway from the West Wing and was completed in 1888.

dailyNews.title: Planned "Arc de Trump" would be over twice as high as Lincoln Memorial

dailyNews.description: Palantir's Maven platform have reportedly been used in the U.S. military campaign in Iran.

dailyNews.title: Trump policies, China's biotech boom are ending Europe's pharma powerhouse era
dailyNews.description: Companies have long lamented Europe's fragmented capital markets, single-market adoption on pricing and clinical trials, and uneven reimbursement policies.

dailyNews.title: U.S. oil slips below $100 as Trump demands reopening of Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: U.S. President Donald Trump on Thursday warned Iran to "stop now" if it was charging tankers to transit the Strait of Hormuz.
